description_long: This house features a complex, multi-gabled roof with dark shingles and a light-colored exterior, giving it a modern suburban appearance. The front facade is symmetrical, with two prominent gabled sections flanking a central entryway beneath a covered porch supported by columns. Large windows are arranged in a balanced pattern, providing ample natural light and enhancing curb appeal. The structure appears to be a single-story dwelling with a wide footprint, likely containing multiple rooms and possibly a garage section. The roof overhangs and porch add architectural interest and provide shelter at the entry. The materials suggest a combination of wood framing, concrete foundation, glass windows, and asphalt shingles.
description: A modern, single-story house with a multi-gabled dark roof, light exterior walls, and a prominent covered front porch with columns and symmetrical window placement.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, covered porch with columns, and symmetrical gabled sections with large windows.
description_view_1: Side-rear view highlighting the depth of the house, multiple rooflines, and a possible garage or secondary entrance.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back gables and a more private facade with fewer windows and no visible entryway.
description_view_3: Side view emphasizing the extended rooflines, side walls, and the connection between the main and secondary sections of the house.
attribute_entryway_design: Central covered porch with columns, steps, and a prominent main door beneath a gabled overhang
